verses.text: Israel Kumpi gam in siatna a thuak ding hita hi. Zu a kham, a gam makaite' lu tungah a om pak tawh a kibawl Kumpi lukhu bangin a minthan'na maimangta hi. A lutang uh paknamtui kinuh napi-in zukhamin tukmangkhin uh hi
En un, a vang a lian, a hat mahmah mi khat Topa in nei hi. A susia huihpi gialpi, tuikhang leh a thahat huihpi bangin amah in leilak den'gawpna ding hi
Israel zukham makaite in a kiphatsakpih kumpi lukhu pen khenuai-ah kituancil ding hi
Tua a kiphasak zukham makaite' minthan'na pen tuk tun' ma-in a om theipal min tawh kibang ding a, mi khat in tua theigah a muh ciangin lo-in a nekpah bangin maimang lel ding hi
Tua ni ciangin Vanglian Topa pen ama mi a omlaite-a' dingin minthan'na kumpi lukhu leh hoihna lukhu hi ding hi
Thukhenin a tupa tungah thutang lungsim guan' ding a, khuapikulh hong luh galte a notkhia ding mite tungah han'na lungsim guan' ding hi.

Hih mite zong leenggahzu tawh hoi-in khamtheihzu tawh awn uh hi. Siampite leh kamsangte nangawn zukhamin hoi uh hi. Kamsangte in zu kham lua uh ahih manin Pasian' muhsak maangmuhnate thei theilo uh a, siampite in zong zu kham lua uh ahih manin a thukhen dingte uh khen theilo uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh sabuai tung khempeuh a luak uh tawh kidim a, a nitlohna mun omlo hi
Amaute in kei hong phunsan uh a, “Amah in kua tungah hilh a, kua tungah thu gena kinei ahi hiam? Angsung panin a kilakhia, nawi tawh a kikhen tung naungekte a hilha kinei ahi hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh mal khat khit mal khat, gual khat khit gual khat, thu khat khit thu khat, cih bang hilel hi,” hong ci uh hi
A mantakin, note in ka thugen na ngaih kei uh leh Topa in a pau na theihloh uh gamdang mite, note tungah thu hong hilhsak ding hi
Topa in note tungah tawlngakna leh lungnopna hong pia napi-in, note in ama thu na ngai kei uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa in note tungah, mal khat khit mal khat, gual khat khit gual khat, thu khat khit thu khat, cih bangin hong hilh ding ahi hi. Tua ciangin na kalsuanna khempeuh uhah na puk ding uh a, note liamin, thangah awkin, salin hong kipaipih ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem khuasungah hih mite a uk, a kiphasak no uliante aw, Topa' thu za un

“Eite in sihna tawh thuciamna khat i bawl khin a, Leinuai tawh thukimna khat i neizo hi. A tuumcip ding tuiciin hong tun' ciangin eite hong banlo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh zuauthu i bel a, zuauna-ah i bu hi,” na ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in, “En un, keimah in Zion sungah bulpi ding khat, suang, a kize-etsa suang, a manpha innkiu suang, bulpi muan'huai khat ka koih hi. Tua suang tungah, ‘Hih a um mi in lungkhamna tuaklo ding hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi
Keimah in thutang pen khaukhai bangin ka bawl ding a, thuman pen khaukhai sikbawk bangin ka bawl ding hi. Gial in na zuau buk uh dengkhia ding a, tui in na bukna mun uh susia ding hi,” ci hi
Tua ciangin sihna tawh na thuciamna uh kiphiat ding a, Leinuai tawh na thukimna uh kiplo ding hi. A tumcip ding tuiciin in a hong nawk ciangin note hong sugawp ding hi

Hong nawk sialin note hong ban ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh zingsang khat khit zingsang khat, sun leh zanin hong nawk tawntung ding hi. Topa' tung panin na zak uh thute a banbanin launa lianpi vive hi ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh puanbuk sungah khe khuan'na dingin lupna tom lua a, silh dingin puanza neu lua hi, a cih tawh na kibang ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a lamdang ama bawlte a bawl ding leh a lamdang ama nasep a sem dingin Perazim Mual tungah a sep bangin Topa in hong sem ding a, Gibeon kuama a heh bangin amah hong heh ding hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, note hong kikhihna a to mahmahin kibawl khading ahih manin thusim loin om kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihonpite' Topa Pasian' tung panin gambuppi-ah siatna ding thukhenna ka za khin hi
Na bil uh hong ngat un la, ka aw hong za un. Ngai un la, ka thugenna hong za un
Lokhopa in khaici tuhna ding a lo kho niloh ahi hiam? Amah in lei kalkhamin git niloh ahi hiam
Amah in lei a zalhtam khit ciangin masala tang vawhin, kummin tang tuh a, mangbuhte a gualgualin tuhin, mangbuhham a omna ding sanah tuh a, mangbuhhamte a nawl hui-ah tuh hilo ahi hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a manin kihilh a, ama Pasian in amah hilh hi
Masalate buhcilna tawh kicil lo a, kummin tangte tungah buhcilna pei kihual lo hi. Ahih hangin masalate ciangkang tawh kisatkhia a, kumminte molhtum tawh kisat hi
Mi khatpeuh in antang cilvui ahi hiam? Hilo hi; amah in cil paisuak ngitnget lo hi. A sakol tawh buhcilna pei a kihualsak ciangin amah in kitamvuisak lo hi
Hih zong Vanglian Topa' kiang pan a hong pai thu ahi hi. Amah pen thu lamlahna-ah lamdang mahmah a, pilna-ah lian mahmah hi.
